title: Kodiak AI (NASDAQ:KDK) Receives “Buy” Rating from Chardan Capital
description: Kodiak AI (NASDAQ:KDK – Get Free Report)‘s stock had its “buy” rating reaffirmed by stock analysts at Chardan Capital in a report issued on Wednesday,Benzinga reports. They currently have a $22.00 price target on the stock. Chardan Capital’s price target would suggest a potential upside of 139.65% from the stock’s current price. Several other research [...]

title: Tesla and xAI to Work Together on AI, Elon Musk Says
description: Tesla and xAI are working together on a joint artificial intelligence project, Elon Musk said Wednesday. The move, which comes after turnover at xAI, is the latest shift in Musk’s plan to build AI designed to replace white collar workers. In a X post , Musk said “Macrohard or Digital Optimus is a ...

title: Surgical AI adapts to changing patients
description: A new adaptive model created at WashU improves surgical predictions across evolving patient populations. The post Surgical AI adapts to changing patients appeared first on The Source .

title: Best AI Crypto: Pepeto Targets 267x With $7.8M Raised as Anthropic Sues Trump Over Claude Ban and SUI Targets $1
description: Anthropic, the company behind Claude, sued the Trump administration for an alleged unlawful retaliation campaign after refusing to let the military use its AI without restrictions. According to CoinDesk, Anthropic was labeled a supply chain risk and Trump ordered federal agencies to stop using the LLM, marking the first time an American company received such [...] The post Best AI Crypto: Pepeto Targets 267x With $7.8M Raised as Anthropic Sues Trump Over Claude Ban and SUI Targets $1 appeared first on TechBullion .

title: Geopolitical Tensions and the Iran Threat Fuel a Defense AI Funding Boom
description: Escalating military tensions with Iran and its regional proxies are driving a massive influx of venture capital into defense technology. As the Pentagon urgently seeks autonomous systems and predictive analytics to counter drone and missile threats, Silicon Valley is pouring billions into artificial intelligence startups focused on national security.
